LanguageData.GravshipRaids.LostTribe.GameStartDialogT:
The enemy came at night. A hostile faction, armed with weapons and machines beyond anything your people had ever faced, swept through your village, cutting and burning.

A handful of you fled aboard a gravship stolen in the chaos - none of you knew how to fly it. Sirens. Tearing metal. The smell of scorched wiring. Its gravlite core failed somewhere over this rimworld, and the hull came apart on the way down.

Five of you survived the crash. The wreck will never fly again, but with no friends to turn to, you must build a new home in the wilderness - like your ancestors did.
